business_problem: SSE Airtricity serves around 750,000 customers across the island of Ireland with smart meters widely deployed, but generic energy tips and black-box third-party tools fell short of personalized insights. The Data & Analytics team needed a fully governed, in-house generative AI solution able to ingest billions of smart-meter readings (48 daily readings per meter) and deliver trusted, auditable recommendations.
solution_summary: SSE Airtricity built the in-house Enhanced Smart Insights (ESI) Energy Advisor on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform — already on Azure after migrating from Oracle, with Unity Catalog providing centralized governance for both data and AI models and Delta Lake as the storage foundation. Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines ingest billions of rows of smart-meter data nightly (48 readings per meter per day across 65,000+ customers) and feed personalization models that call Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 through Databricks AI Model Serving. An evaluation-first MLflow GenAI framework with custom AI judges defined alongside human feedback automatically rejects and regenerates any insights that fail on length, language, tone, or accuracy before they reach customers. Custom Databricks Apps surface real-time monitoring of cost, model performance, and judge failure rates with automated alerts. The team went from concept to production in four months.
business_outcome: Soft-launched in mid-December 2025, the ESI Energy Advisor reached production in four months, drove a 12% increase in unique visitors to the insights section in the first month, and now engages 90% of logged-in customers with personalized recommendations — delivering bill-day insights vs. competitors' 120-day wait and laying the foundation for tariff recommendations, bill analyzer, peer comparisons, and energy disaggregation.
metrics: 90% of logged-in customers engage with personalized insights
+12% unique visitors to insights section in first month
architecture_clues: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Databricks AI Model Serving
Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines for nightly ingestion
Unity Catalog governance across data and AI models
MLflow GenAI evaluation framework with AI judges + human feedback
Databricks Apps for real-time cost and quality monitoring
evidence_quotes: We went from proof of concept to production in about four months
90% of logged-in customers now navigate to the insights section to engage with the recommendations
Within the first month, SSE Airtricity saw a 12% increase in web visits to the insights section

solution_components.name: Delta Lake
solution_components.role: Reliable Lakehouse storage forming the foundational data architecture for the AI strategy

solution_components.name: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines
solution_components.role: Ingests and transforms billions of rows of smart-meter data nightly (48 readings per meter per day) to feed the AI models

solution_components.name: Unity Catalog
solution_components.role: Centralized governance for both data and AI models inherited from the Oracle→Databricks migration

solution_components.name: Databricks AI Model Serving
solution_components.role: Serves Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 to the ESI Energy Advisor without managing infrastructure

solution_components.name: MLflow
solution_components.role: Tracing, GenAI evaluation framework, and AI judges that auto-reject and regenerate failing insights for complete observability and traceability

solution_components.name: Databricks Apps
solution_components.role: Custom monitoring apps tracking cost, model performance, and AI-judge failure rates in real time with automated alerts

solution_components.name: Agent Bricks / Mosaic AI
solution_components.role: Generative AI tooling backing the ESI Energy Advisor

data_flow: Billions of rows of smart-meter readings (48 per meter per day across 65,000+ customers) and customer-survey responses are ingested nightly through Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines into Delta Lake on Databricks (migrated from Oracle), governed by Unity Catalog for both data and AI models. The ESI Energy Advisor calls Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 through Databricks AI Model Serving to generate personalized energy-saving advice. MLflow Traces and an evaluation-first framework — AI judges defined alongside human feedback — automatically reject and regenerate insights that fail on length, language, tone, or accuracy. Databricks Apps host custom monitoring dashboards tracking cost, model performance, and judge failure rates in real time.
integration_points: Smart-meter network (~65,000 customers, 48 readings per meter per day)
